---
bibliography: ../references.bib
---

# Acknowledgments {.unnumbered}

We thank the people and organisations that contribute data collection,
provision, validation, model review, and assessment advice for WCPO tuna stock
assessments. We also acknowledge the software, computing, and data-management
support required to run and document these models.

> **TODO:** Update acknowledgments for the final `r assessment_year` assessment,
> including data providers, reviewers, workshop participants, software and
> computing support, and project funding.
